mnemonics.title: Kruskal vs Prim
mnemonics.content: Kruskal 'Keeps Adding Shortest Edges', Prim 'Picks Root, Includes Minimum'

acronyms.usage: Used in network design to minimize connection costs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine peeling away edges from graph until only skeleton connecting all nodes remains

analogies.analogy: Like building minimal road network connecting all cities without loops
